verbGlossary.ISSUED FOR: {source} is granted based on {target} building or scope attribute classification (e.g., building permit issued for the specified construction type)
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric or record is broken down by {target} attribute for comparative analysis
verbGlossary.TRIGGERED BY: {source} is activated because {target} attribute meets a threshold or condition (e.g., demolition permit triggered by existing building scope)
verbGlossary.CONDITIONED BY: {source} includes conditions dictated by {target} attribute's constraints (e.g., renovation permit conditioned by occupied-during-construction status)
verbGlossary.REQUIRED BY: {source} or compliance document is mandated because {target} attribute triggers a regulatory obligation
verbGlossary.REQUIRED FOR: {source} is needed because {target} includes the target system or type attribute
verbGlossary.REVIEWED AGAINST: {source} plan review evaluates project documents against {target} or standard attribute
verbGlossary.INSPECTS FOR: {source} conducts field inspection to verify compliance with {target} attribute
verbGlossary.SOUGHT FOR: {source}is filed because the proposed project exceeds {target} zoning limit
verbGlossary.SCALED TO: {source} requirements increase proportionally with {target} area attribute
verbGlossary.SITED AT: {source}connection permit is location-specific to {target} address attribute
verbGlossary.VERIFIED AGAINST: {source} confirms compliance with {target} accessibility, structural, or energy code attribute
verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: Inspection or safety plan complexity is determined by {target} attribute's classification or dimensions
verbGlossary.TRIGGERS: {source} issuance marks the milestone that sets {target} completion date or status attribute
verbGlossary.ADVANCES: {source} moves {target} status attribute toward final closeout
verbGlossary.TAILORED TO: {source}plan content is customized based on {target} type's specific hazard and compliance profile
verbGlossary.MEASURED WITHIN: {source} processing time metric falls within {target} preconstruction duration
verbGlossary.CONTRIBUTES TO: {source} hold duration adds to {target} schedule growth metric
verbGlossary.BLOCKS: Open permit prevents {target} status attribute from advancing to the next milestone
verbGlossary.SCALED BY: {source} renewal frequency increases with {target} actual duration attribute's length
